context.role: Flying obstacle that player can pass under without ducking
context.screen_position: Spawns at x=screen_width+50px, y=80px (ground+80px), scrolls left at Current_Speed
context.usage_scenario: Mid-air obstacle appearing after score 200+, can be avoided by running normally or jumping (50% of pterodactyl spawns)

visual_specification.shape: Pteranodon with long beak, spread wings in flight pose

animation.description: Frame 1: wings up position, Frame 2: wings down position, flapping animation

visual_specification.details: Flying pterodactyl at 80px height (above player running hitbox), wing flapping animation, hitbox 89x77px (3px margin from sprite)

relationships.shared_with: Identical sprite and animation as pterodactyl_low, only Y position differs
relationships.differences_from: pterodactyl_low spawns at y=50px (requires ducking), pterodactyl_high at y=80px (can pass under)

explicit_negations: No particle effects or motion blur
